headlines.title: Got maggots? These doctors are bringing the bugs into their practice on purpose
headlines.description: The lowly maggot gets a bad rap, mostly known for feeding on corpses and rotting meat.

headlines.title: Where does hantavirus lurk in the U.S.? Scientists found ‘hot spots’ in surprising areas
headlines.description: A recent suspected hantavirus case in Illinois is a stark reminder that the potentially deadly virus does exist in the U.S.There are currently no cases of hantavirus in the U.S. that are linked to the MV Hondius cruise ship outbreak.

headlines.title: Florida surgeon who removed wrong organ says he is ‘forever traumatized’ by patient’s death
headlines.description: Thomas Shaknovsky said in a deposition in November that he believed he was removing 70-year-old William Bryan’s spleen, not his liver.

headlines.title: He pitched military service with a promise of lifetime healthcare. When he needed it, the system failed.
headlines.description: For more than a decade, Guy Shoemaker pitched military service to potential new recruits with one key promise: healthcare for life.“You’re going to have medical and dental for the rest of your life,” said Shoemaker, a retired Army sergeant first class and recruiter who spent a year in Afghanistan.

headlines.title: Dr. Edith Eger, Holocaust Survivor and Psychologist, Dies at 98
headlines.description: Dr. Edith Eger, a young ballerina who survived Auschwitz and grew up to become a prominent psychologist helping others living through severe trauma of their own, has died at 98. Edger spent her career helping cancer patients, military veterans and survivors of abuse with a goal to liberate them from suffering. Sunday TODAY’s Willie Geist remembers a life well lived.

headlines.title: Easy Workouts to Build Strength in Core, Legs, Arms at Any Age
headlines.description: Fitness icon Denise Austin and her daughter Katie join TODAY’s Jenna Bush Hager and Sheinelle Jones to share three quick and easy workouts that you can do at any age. They show moves to tighten your core, squats that strengthen your legs, and more.

headlines.title: Jackie Tohn Opens up About Her Health Scare With Breast Cancer
headlines.description: Jackie Tohn opens up to TODAY's Jenna Bush Hager and Sheinelle Jones about her recent health scare where she learned she has an 85 percent chance of developing breast cancer and her decision to undergo a double mastectomy. She also discusses the third season of "Nobody Wants This" and facing off against Macaulay Culkin on "Celebrity Jeopardy."

headlines.title: Supreme Court Allows Abortion Pill to Remain Available by Mail
headlines.description: The Supreme Court ensured on Thursday that the abortion pill mifepristone can continue to be available by mail without an in-person visit to a doctor. The ruling blocks a lower court decision that would have restricted access to the medication nationwide.

headlines.title: Is the Forme Power Bra really worth $179?
headlines.description: I tested the Forme Power Bra for five months to see if it could improve my posture and back support. Here’s what actually happened.

headlines.title: The best running watches, tested over hundreds of miles
headlines.description: I’ve tested dozens of running watches from Garmin, Coros, Amazfit, Fitbit, Apple and more. Here are my top picks for beginners, races and ultra-athletes alike.

headlines.title: The best men’s walking shoes of 2026, tested and reviewed
headlines.description: Shop expert-recommended and staff-tested men’s walking shoes from Brooks, On, New Balance and Hoka.

headlines.title: I’ve tested dozens of workout headphones: These are the best
headlines.description: I tested over a dozen workout headphones from brands like Apple, Beats, and Shokz to find our top picks for running, biking, the gym and more.
